## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Datagrid and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, website revamp, and performance updates.](https://fathom.video/share/mgWtDj6pkyRaskjXUy_owDfKM9wt2anV?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content pause and strategy shift**: Content creation will pause next week for internal audit; exploring shift to fewer but longer-form technical pieces focused on high-performing topics (construction, agent frameworks)](https://fathom.video/share/mgWtDj6pkyRaskjXUy_owDfKM9wt2anV?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [**Website revamp progress**: New site map complete; feedback needed ASAP before afternoon meeting with WonderUp as changes are more difficult/expensive after initial build](https://fathom.video/share/mgWtDj6pkyRaskjXUy_owDfKM9wt2anV?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)
  - [**Social media feedback**: Thiago's feedback on LinkedIn posts - too formulaic/choppy; need more conversational tone with varied sentence structure](https://fathom.video/share/mgWtDj6pkyRaskjXUy_owDfKM9wt2anV?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
  - [**Performance metrics**: Hitting new highs in sessions and views; promising performance in finance, real estate, and e-commerce verticals; LLM referrals at 53 sessions (near high)](https://fathom.video/share/mgWtDj6pkyRaskjXUy_owDfKM9wt2anV?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)

## Topics

### Website Revamp - Fundraising Priority

  - [Thiago emphasized website rebuild is critical timing-wise due to upcoming fundraising activities](https://fathom.video/share/mgWtDj6pkyRaskjXUy_owDfKM9wt2anV?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)
  - [Site map is complete; Mara will share feedback notes immediately after call](https://fathom.video/share/mgWtDj6pkyRaskjXUy_owDfKM9wt2anV?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [Current focus is getting structure right the first time since "making changes is going to be a lot harder" after build](https://fathom.video/share/mgWtDj6pkyRaskjXUy_owDfKM9wt2anV?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
  - [Will need to migrate all existing content to new site structure](https://fathom.video/share/mgWtDj6pkyRaskjXUy_owDfKM9wt2anV?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
  - [Meeting with WonderUp (web design team) scheduled for later today](https://fathom.video/share/mgWtDj6pkyRaskjXUy_owDfKM9wt2anV?tab=summary&timestamp=53.0)

### Content Strategy Evolution

  - [Current pace: Publishing 25 articles weekly; will hit 535 articles by Saturday](https://fathom.video/share/mgWtDj6pkyRaskjXUy_owDfKM9wt2anV?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [Vivek announced one-week pause on content creation/publishing for internal process audit](https://fathom.video/share/mgWtDj6pkyRaskjXUy_owDfKM9wt2anV?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [Thiago proposed strategy pivot: "I want to try different type, different length" - fewer but longer-form technical content](https://fathom.video/share/mgWtDj6pkyRaskjXUy_owDfKM9wt2anV?tab=summary&timestamp=1251.0)
  - [Suggested exploring business cases, white papers, deeper industry explorations (construction, manufacturing)](https://fathom.video/share/mgWtDj6pkyRaskjXUy_owDfKM9wt2anV?tab=summary&timestamp=1251.0)
  - [Proposal to cluster content around what's performing well:](https://fathom.video/share/mgWtDj6pkyRaskjXUy_owDfKM9wt2anV?tab=summary&timestamp=1251.0)
      - [Construction-related content](https://fathom.video/share/mgWtDj6pkyRaskjXUy_owDfKM9wt2anV?tab=summary&timestamp=1251.0)
      - [Deep "agentic frameworks/patterns"](https://fathom.video/share/mgWtDj6pkyRaskjXUy_owDfKM9wt2anV?tab=summary&timestamp=1251.0)
      - [Industry adoption case studies](https://fathom.video/share/mgWtDj6pkyRaskjXUy_owDfKM9wt2anV?tab=summary&timestamp=1251.0)
  - [New verticals showing promise: finance, real estate, e-commerce](https://fathom.video/share/mgWtDj6pkyRaskjXUy_owDfKM9wt2anV?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)

### Social Media Content Feedback

  - [Thiago provided feedback on LinkedIn posts: current approach feels too "choppy" and formulaic](https://fathom.video/share/mgWtDj6pkyRaskjXUy_owDfKM9wt2anV?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
  - [Needs more natural conversational flow: "Very spaced evenly, like sentences like this... gets tiring and boring"](https://fathom.video/share/mgWtDj6pkyRaskjXUy_owDfKM9wt2anV?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)
  - [Preference for more formed-out sentences versus short LinkedIn-style formatting](https://fathom.video/share/mgWtDj6pkyRaskjXUy_owDfKM9wt2anV?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
  - [Editorial judgment issues: cited example where content suggested 8-year-olds should use AI (disagrees)](https://fathom.video/share/mgWtDj6pkyRaskjXUy_owDfKM9wt2anV?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
  - [Will review latest batch of posts but is having trouble accessing Assembly due to AWS outage](https://fathom.video/share/mgWtDj6pkyRaskjXUy_owDfKM9wt2anV?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)

### Performance Metrics Update

  - [Shifted from Search Console to GA4 for metrics due to Google outage affecting data](https://fathom.video/share/mgWtDj6pkyRaskjXUy_owDfKM9wt2anV?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
  - [Hitting new highs in sessions and views](https://fathom.video/share/mgWtDj6pkyRaskjXUy_owDfKM9wt2anV?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)
  - [53 session referrals from LLMs (slightly below previous week's high)](https://fathom.video/share/mgWtDj6pkyRaskjXUy_owDfKM9wt2anV?tab=summary&timestamp=908.0)
  - [Traffic sources include GPT, Gemini, and Perplexity](https://fathom.video/share/mgWtDj6pkyRaskjXUy_owDfKM9wt2anV?tab=summary&timestamp=926.0)
  - [Team building enhanced LLM visibility reporting tool](https://fathom.video/share/mgWtDj6pkyRaskjXUy_owDfKM9wt2anV?tab=summary&timestamp=950.0)
  - [Thiago received walkthrough of SEMrush tools for keyword analysis](https://fathom.video/share/mgWtDj6pkyRaskjXUy_owDfKM9wt2anV?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)

### JTBD Customer Interviews Challenge

  - [Project stalled due to strategic timing concerns with customers](https://fathom.video/share/mgWtDj6pkyRaskjXUy_owDfKM9wt2anV?tab=summary&timestamp=1141.0)
  - [Thiago explained risk of asking enterprise customers for interviews during negotiation stages: "Asking them to do this gives them leverage"](https://fathom.video/share/mgWtDj6pkyRaskjXUy_owDfKM9wt2anV?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
  - [Current customer base either too early in journey or in sensitive enterprise negotiation stage](https://fathom.video/share/mgWtDj6pkyRaskjXUy_owDfKM9wt2anV?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)
  - [Proposed postponing to Q3 rather than proceeding with limited sample (3 customers)](https://fathom.video/share/mgWtDj6pkyRaskjXUy_owDfKM9wt2anV?tab=summary&timestamp=1141.0)
  - [Mara agreed: better to wait than "burning through three conversations" without sufficient value](https://fathom.video/share/mgWtDj6pkyRaskjXUy_owDfKM9wt2anV?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mara to share website feedback notes within 30 minutes](https://fathom.video/share/mgWtDj6pkyRaskjXUy_owDfKM9wt2anV?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [Vivek to continue internal audit next week (content creation paused)](https://fathom.video/share/mgWtDj6pkyRaskjXUy_owDfKM9wt2anV?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [Team to plan content strategy shift toward longer-form technical pieces](https://fathom.video/share/mgWtDj6pkyRaskjXUy_owDfKM9wt2anV?tab=summary&timestamp=1251.0)
  - [Raph to share social media drafts with Thiago (via alternative method due to AWS outage)](https://fathom.video/share/mgWtDj6pkyRaskjXUy_owDfKM9wt2anV?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [Cancel immediate follow-up sync call to give Thiago time for content review](https://fathom.video/share/mgWtDj6pkyRaskjXUy_owDfKM9wt2anV?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
  - [Resume GSC data reporting once Google issue is resolved](https://fathom.video/share/mgWtDj6pkyRaskjXUy_owDfKM9wt2anV?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)
  - [Postpone JTBD customer interviews to Q3 when more customers are available](https://fathom.video/share/mgWtDj6pkyRaskjXUy_owDfKM9wt2anV?tab=summary&timestamp=1141.0)
